# Punk Records Inference

> KV-state persistence for vLLM. Capture attention + hybrid recurrent state after each agent turn, store on disk (.nls), re-inject on the next request so the model skips re-prefilling full history. Docker plugin for vLLM; BYOC model checkpoint.

PRI extends the OpenAI chat completions API with `kv_transfer_params` on each request. Agent middleware (NLS_AGENT_SHIM=1) can populate these for tool-calling clients automatically.

## Canonical docs (start here)

- [Documentation index](docs/index.md): Full map — getting started, guides, reference, internal.
- [Installation](docs/getting-started/installation.md): GPU, Docker, checkpoint setup.
- [Quickstart](docs/getting-started/quickstart.md): Docker build, health check, first bench.
- [Core concepts](docs/getting-started/concepts.md): Capture, resume, Swiss, overflow.
- [Integrating OpenCode](docs/guides/integrating-opencode.md): Agent shim, KVP, reference harness.
- [Environment variables](docs/reference/env-vars.md): Consolidated NLS_* reference.
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Runtime flow, package layout.
- [Client contract](docs/CLIENT_CONTRACT.md): kv_transfer_params fields and examples.
- [Troubleshooting](docs/guides/troubleshooting.md): Common failures and diagnostics.
- [GitHub repo](https://github.com/umbecanessa/punk-records-inference): Source (private until public release).

## Install (copy-paste-runnable)

```bash
git clone https://github.com/umbecanessa/punk-records-inference.git
cd punk-records-inference
export MODEL_PATH=/path/to/your/checkpoint
docker compose -f docker/compose.yaml up --build
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1/models
```

Unit tests (no GPU): `pip install pytest torch zstandard && pytest tests/ -q`

## Key subsystems

- Capture: WRITE turn state → .nls (NLS_CHAIN_CAPTURE_MODE=turn)
- Resume: READ prior turn KV (memory_inject_mode=resume, turn ≥ 2)
- Overflow: resume + Swiss when trim evicts (memory_inject_mode=resume_overflow, opt-in)
- Agent shim: pri.middleware.agent_shim — strip transcript, capture_start, chain metadata

## Package layout

- pri/connector.py — vLLM KV connector (inject + capture)
- pri/resume.py — chain block collection + resume inject config
- pri/store.py — on-disk memory index (JSONL)
- pri/retrieve.py — Swiss retrieval (optional)
- pri/middleware/agent_shim.py — agent transcript strip + KVP enrichment
- docker/start.sh — vLLM launch + startup_profile env gating

## Benchmarks

- Tier-1 Marco facts: ./bench/run_suite.sh --tier 1
- OpenCode long session: ./bench/run_suite.sh --tier opencode --seed 42
- Publication tables: in progress — see docs/BENCHMARKS.md (smoke baselines green; sweep/compare pending)

## Limitations (v0.1)

- KV capture/resume only — not text compression, not MoE routing, not hosted SaaS
- Single-node, BYOC checkpoint required
- Qwen3.5 hybrid validated; other topologies need startup_profile tuning
- License TBD (provisional patent 64/050,345)

## Internal (maintainers)

- docs/internal/README.md — ship plan, bench data plan, agent handoff
